metadata.name: test
metadata.author: me
metadata.description: Ancient seals have been scattered across the land. Recover them from dangerous dungeons and return them to the altar in Elderreach to restore the protective ward.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Elderreach
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

key_dungeons.name: Forsaken Keep
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Forsaken Keep. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Forsaken Keep for the hidden Coral Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
